77	
78	            if (deviceBindingService != null && deviceFingerprint.isNotBlank()) {
79	                val bindResult = deviceBindingService.checkAndBindDevice(userId, deviceFingerprint)
80	                if (bindResult is DeviceBindingResult.LimitExceeded) {
81	                    _state.value = snapshot.copy(
82	                        error = "Device limit exceeded (${bindResult.bound}/${bindResult.max}). Ask an Admin to reset your device bindings.",
83	                    )
84	                    return@launch
85	                }
86	            }
87	
88	            securityRepository.recordSuccess(userId)
89	            val now = clock.now()
90	            _state.value = snapshot.copy(
91	                principal = principal,
92	                error = null,
93	                password = "",
94	                sessionExpiresAt = now.plus(sessionDuration),
95	                absoluteSessionExpiresAt = now.plus(absoluteSessionLimit),
96	            )
97	        }
98	    }
99	
100	    fun ensureSessionActive() {
101	        val now = clock.now()
102	        val idleExpiry = _state.value.sessionExpiresAt
103	        val absoluteExpiry = _state.value.absoluteSessionExpiresAt
104	
105	        if (idleExpiry != null && now >= idleExpiry) {
106	            logout("Session expired. Please sign in again.")
107	            return
108	        }
109	        if (absoluteExpiry != null && now >= absoluteExpiry) {
110	            logout("Maximum session duration reached. Please sign in again.")
111	            return
112	        }
113	    }
114	
115	    fun touchSession() {
116	        val snapshot = _state.value
117	        if (!snapshot.isAuthenticated) return
118	        _state.value = snapshot.copy(sessionExpiresAt = clock.now().plus(sessionDuration))
119	    }
120	
121	    fun logout(message: String? = null) {
122	        val previous = _state.value
123	        _state.value = AuthUiState(
124	            username = previous.username,
125	            error = message,
126	        )
127	    }
128	}

1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security
2	
3	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.UserDao
4	import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
5	import kotlinx.datetime.Instant
6	import kotlin.time.Duration
7	import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.minutes
8	
9	data class PasswordPolicyResult(
10	    val isValid: Boolean,
11	    val errors: List<String>,
12	)
13	
14	class SecurityRepository(
15	    private val clock: Clock,
16	    private val userDao: UserDao? = null,
17	    private val lockoutThreshold: Int = 5,
18	    private val lockoutDuration: Duration = 15.minutes,
19	) {
20	    fun validatePassword(password: String): PasswordPolicyResult {
21	        val errors = buildList {
22	            if (password.length < 10) add("Password must be at least 10 characters.")
23	            if (!password.any(Char::isDigit)) add("Password must include at least one numeric character.")
24	        }
25	        return PasswordPolicyResult(isValid = errors.isEmpty(), errors = errors)
26	    }
27	
28	    suspend fun canAuthenticate(userId: String, now: Instant = clock.now()): Boolean {
29	        val dao = userDao ?: return false
30	        val user = dao.getById(userId) ?: return true
31	        val lockedUntil = user.lockedUntil ?: return true
32	        return now.toEpochMilliseconds() >= lockedUntil
33	    }
34	
35	    suspend fun recordFailure(userId: String, now: Instant = clock.now()) {
36	        val dao = userDao ?: return
37	        val user = dao.getById(userId) ?: return
38	        val newFailures = user.failedAttempts + 1
39	        val lockUntil = if (newFailures >= lockoutThreshold) {
40	            now.plus(lockoutDuration).toEpochMilliseconds()
41	        } else null
42	        dao.update(user.copy(failedAttempts = newFailures, lockedUntil = lockUntil))
43	    }
44	
45	    suspend fun recordSuccess(userId: String) {
46	        val dao = userDao ?: return
47	        val user = dao.getById(userId) ?: return
48	        dao.update(user.copy(failedAttempts = 0, lockedUntil = null))
49	    }
50	}

30	    val quantity: Int,
31	    val unitPrice: Double,
32	)

36	    val subtotal: Double,
37	    val tax: Double,

42	)

44	data class OrderFinanceState(
45	    val cart: List<CartItem> = emptyList(),
46	    val invoices: List<InvoiceDraft> = emptyList(),
47	    val refunds: List<String> = emptyList(),
48	    val note: String? = null,
49	)
50	
51	class OrderFinanceViewModel(
52	    private val abac: AbacPolicyEvaluator,
53	    private val permissionEvaluator: PermissionEvaluator,
54	    private val validationService: ValidationService,
55	    private val deviceBindingService: DeviceBindingService,
56	    private val cartDao: CartDao,
57	    private val stateMachine: OrderStateMachine? = null,
58	    private val notificationGateway: NotificationGateway,
59	    private val receiptGateway: ReceiptGateway,
60	    private val deviceFingerprint: String = getDeviceFingerprint(),
61	) {
62	    private var scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
63	    private val _state = MutableStateFlow(OrderFinanceState())
64	    val state: StateFlow<OrderFinanceState> = _state.asStateFlow()
65	
66	    private suspend fun resolveDeviceTrust(userId: String): Boolean {
67	        return deviceBindingService.isDeviceTrusted(userId, deviceFingerprint)
68	    }
69	
70	    fun addCartItem(
71	        role: Role,
72	        actorId: String,
73	        delegateForUserId: String? = null,
74	        resourceId: String,
75	        label: String,
76	        quantity: Int,
77	        unitPrice: Double,
78	    ) {
79	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
80	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Add item denied for role")
81	            return
82	        }
83	        val priceError = validationService.validatePrice(unitPrice)
84	        if (priceError != null) {
85	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = priceError)
86	            return
87	        }
88	        if (quantity <= 0) {
89	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Quantity must be at least 1")
90	            return
91	        }
92	        val ownerId = delegateForUserId ?: actorId
93	        val itemId = "item-${_state.value.cart.size + 1}"
94	        val next = CartItem(
95	            id = itemId,
96	            label = label,
97	            quantity = quantity,
98	            unitPrice = unitPrice,
99	        )
100	        _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = _state.value.cart + next, note = null)
101	
102	        scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
103	            cartDao.upsert(
104	                CartItemEntity(
105	                    id = itemId,
106	                    userId = ownerId,
107	                    actorId = actorId,
108	                    resourceId = resourceId,
109	                    label = next.label,
110	                    quantity = next.quantity,
111	                    unitPrice = next.unitPrice,
112	                ),
113	            )
114	        }
115	    }
116	
117	    internal fun addDemoItem(role: Role, actorId: String, delegateForUserId: String? = null) {
118	        addCartItem(
119	            role = role,
120	            actorId = actorId,
121	            delegateForUserId = delegateForUserId,
122	            resourceId = "res-1",
123	            label = "Service Package ${_state.value.cart.size + 1}",
124	            quantity = 1,
125	            unitPrice = 49.99,
126	        )
127	    }
128	
129	    fun splitFirstItem(role: Role, actorId: String, delegateForUserId: String? = null) {
130	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
131	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Split denied for role")
132	            return
133	        }
134	        val first = _state.value.cart.firstOrNull() ?: return
135	        if (first.quantity < 2) {
136	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Split requires quantity >= 2")
137	            return
138	        }
139	        val ownerId = delegateForUserId ?: actorId
140	        val left = first.copy(id = "${first.id}-a", quantity = first.quantity / 2)
141	        val right = first.copy(id = "${first.id}-b", quantity = first.quantity - left.quantity)
142	        _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = listOf(left, right) + _state.value.cart.drop(1), note = "Order split")
143	        scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
144	            cartDao.deleteByIdForUser(first.id, ownerId)
145	            cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = left.id, userId = ownerId, actorId = actorId, resourceId = "res-1", label = left.label, quantity = left.quantity, unitPrice = left.unitPrice))
146	            cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = right.id, userId = ownerId, actorId = actorId, resourceId = "res-1", label = right.label, quantity = right.quantity, unitPrice = right.unitPrice))
147	        }
148	    }
149	
150	    fun mergeFirstTwoItems(role: Role, actorId: String, delegateForUserId: String? = null) {
151	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
152	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Merge denied for role")
153	            return
154	        }
155	        val ownerId = delegateForUserId ?: actorId
156	        val cart = _state.value.cart
157	        if (cart.size < 2) return
158	        val merged = cart[0].copy(
159	            id = "${cart[0].id}+${cart[1].id}",
160	            quantity = cart[0].quantity + cart[1].quantity,
161	            unitPrice = cart[0].unitPrice,
162	        )
163	        _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = listOf(merged) + cart.drop(2), note = "Orders merged")
164	        scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
165	            cartDao.deleteByIdForUser(cart[0].id, ownerId)
166	            cartDao.deleteByIdForUser(cart[1].id, ownerId)
167	            cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = merged.id, userId = ownerId, actorId = actorId, resourceId = "res-1", label = merged.label, quantity = merged.quantity, unitPrice = merged.unitPrice))
168	        }
169	    }
170	
171	    fun generateInvoice(role: Role, actorId: String, delegateForUserId: String? = null) {
172	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
173	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Invoice denied for role")
174	            return
175	        }
176	        if (_state.value.cart.isEmpty()) return
177	        val subtotal = _state.value.cart.sumOf { it.unitPrice * it.quantity }
178	        val priceError = validationService.validatePrice(subtotal)
179	        if (priceError != null) {
180	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = priceError)
181	            return
182	        }
183	
184	        val ownerId = delegateForUserId ?: actorId
185	        scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
186	            val trusted = resolveDeviceTrust(actorId)
187	            val isDelegate = delegateForUserId != null
188	            val context = AccessContext(requesterId = actorId, ownerId = ownerId, isDelegate = isDelegate, deviceTrusted = trusted)
189	            val tax = if (abac.canReadInvoiceTaxField(role, context)) subtotal * 0.12 else 0.0
190	            val invoice = InvoiceDraft(
191	                id = "inv-${_state.value.invoices.size + 1}",
192	                subtotal = subtotal,
193	                tax = tax,
194	                total = subtotal + tax,
195	                orderId = _state.value.cart.firstOrNull()?.id,
196	                ownerId = ownerId,
197	                actorId = actorId,
198	            )
199	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(invoices = _state.value.invoices + invoice, note = "Invoice generated")
200	
201	            try {
202	                notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady(invoice.id, invoice.total)
203	            } catch (_: Exception) { /* notification scheduling is best-effort */ }
204	
205	            try {
206	                val receiptItems = _state.value.cart.map {
207	                    ReceiptLineItem(label = it.label, amount = it.quantity * it.unitPrice)
208	                }
209	                receiptGateway.shareReceipt(invoice.id, ownerId, receiptItems, invoice.total)
210	            } catch (_: Exception) { /* receipt generation is best-effort */ }
211	        }
212	    }
213	
214	    fun refundLatest(role: Role, actorId: String) {
215	        val latest = _state.value.invoices.lastOrNull() ?: return
216	        scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
217	            val trusted = resolveDeviceTrust(actorId)
218	            val context = AccessContext(requesterId = actorId, ownerId = actorId, isDelegate = false, deviceTrusted = trusted)
219	            if (!abac.canIssueRefund(role, context)) {
220	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Refund denied for role")
221	                return@launch
222	            }
223	            val orderId = latest.orderId
224	            if (orderId == null || stateMachine == null) {
225	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Refund requires a linked order")
226	                return@launch
227	            }
228	            val requested = stateMachine.requestRefund(orderId, role)
229	            val completed = if (requested) stateMachine.completeRefund(orderId, role) else false
230	            if (!requested || !completed) {
231	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Refund state transition failed")
232	                return@launch
233	            }
234	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(refunds = _state.value.refunds + "Refunded ${latest.id}", note = "Refund completed")
235	        }
236	    }
237	
238	    fun clearSessionState() {
239	        scope.cancel()
240	        scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
241	        _state.value = OrderFinanceState()
242	    }
243	}

12	actual class ReceiptService {
13	    actual suspend fun generateAndSharePdf(data: ReceiptData) {
14	        try {
15	            val context = AndroidPlatformContext.require()
16	
17	            val file = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
18	                val document = PdfDocument()
19	                val pageInfo = PdfDocument.PageInfo.Builder(595, 842, 1).create()
20	                val page = document.startPage(pageInfo)
21	
22	                val paint = Paint().apply { textSize = 14f }
23	                var y = 48f
24	                page.canvas.drawText("Receipt #${data.receiptId}", 36f, y, paint)
25	                y += 28f
26	                page.canvas.drawText("Customer: ${data.customerName}", 36f, y, paint)
27	                y += 28f
28	
29	                data.lineItems.forEach { item ->
30	                    page.canvas.drawText("${item.label}: $${"%.2f".format(item.amount)}", 36f, y, paint)
31	                    y += 24f
32	                }
33	
34	                y += 16f
35	                page.canvas.drawText("Total: $${"%.2f".format(data.total)}", 36f, y, paint)
36	
37	                document.finishPage(page)
38	
39	                val file = File(context.cacheDir, "receipt-${data.receiptId}.pdf")
40	                FileOutputStream(file).use { output -> document.writeTo(output) }
41	                document.close()
42	                file
43	            }
44	            val uri = FileProvider.getUriForFile(
45	                context,
46	                "${context.packageName}.fileprovider",
47	                file,
48	            )
49	            val shareIntent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND).apply {
50	                type = "application/pdf"
51	                putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM, uri)
52	                putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_SUBJECT, "Receipt ${data.receiptId}")
53	                addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)
54	            }
55	            val chooser = Intent.createChooser(shareIntent, "Share receipt").apply {
56	                addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)
57	            }
58	            context.startActivity(chooser)
59	        } catch (e: Exception) {
60	            println("[ReceiptService] Error generating PDF: ${e.message}")
61	        }
62	    }
63	}

282	                                        .fillMaxWidth()

1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.ui.navigation
2	
3	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
4	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
5	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
6	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
7	
8	sealed class Screen {
9	    data object Dashboard : Screen()
10	    data object Calendar : Screen()
11	    data class OrderDetail(val orderId: String) : Screen()
12	    data object Cart : Screen()
13	    data class InvoiceDetail(val invoiceId: String) : Screen()
14	    data class MeetingDetail(val meetingId: String) : Screen()
15	}
16	
17	class AppNavigator {
18	    private val _currentScreen = MutableStateFlow<Screen>(Screen.Dashboard)
19	    val currentScreen: StateFlow<Screen> = _currentScreen.asStateFlow()
20	
21	    private val backStack = mutableListOf<Screen>()
22	
23	    fun navigateTo(screen: Screen, role: Role): Boolean {
24	        if (!isScreenAllowed(screen, role)) return false
25	        backStack.add(_currentScreen.value)
26	        _currentScreen.value = screen
27	        return true
28	    }
29	
30	    fun goBack(): Boolean {
31	        if (backStack.isEmpty()) return false
32	        _currentScreen.value = backStack.removeLast()
33	        return true
34	    }
35	
36	    fun resetToDashboard() {
37	        backStack.clear()
38	        _currentScreen.value = Screen.Dashboard
39	    }
40	
41	    companion object {
42	        fun isScreenAllowed(screen: Screen, role: Role): Boolean = when (screen) {
43	            is Screen.Dashboard, is Screen.Calendar -> true
44	            is Screen.OrderDetail, is Screen.Cart -> role != Role.Viewer
45	            is Screen.InvoiceDetail -> role == Role.Admin || role == Role.Supervisor || role == Role.Operator
46	            is Screen.MeetingDetail -> role != Role.Viewer
47	        }
48	    }
49	}

27	@Composable
28	fun App(
29	    resourceListViewModel: ResourceListViewModel,
30	    authViewModel: AuthViewModel,
31	    orderWorkflowViewModel: OrderWorkflowViewModel,
32	    meetingWorkflowViewModel: MeetingWorkflowViewModel,
33	    orderFinanceViewModel: OrderFinanceViewModel,
34	    learningViewModel: LearningViewModel? = null,
35	) {
36	    val authState by authViewModel.state.collectAsState()
37	    val navigator = remember { AppNavigator() }
38	
39	    fun clearAllSessionState() {
40	        resourceListViewModel.clearSessionState()
41	        orderWorkflowViewModel.clearSessionState()
42	        meetingWorkflowViewModel.clearSessionState()
43	        orderFinanceViewModel.clearSessionState()
44	        learningViewModel?.clearSessionState()
45	        navigator.resetToDashboard()
46	    }
47	
48	    LaunchedEffect(authState.isAuthenticated) {
49	        if (!authState.isAuthenticated) {
50	            clearAllSessionState()
51	        }
52	        while (authState.isAuthenticated) {
53	            delay(30_000)
54	            val wasAuthenticated = authViewModel.state.value.isAuthenticated
55	            authViewModel.ensureSessionActive()
56	            if (wasAuthenticated && !authViewModel.state.value.isAuthenticated) {
57	                clearAllSessionState()
58	            }
59	        }
60	    }
61	
62	    Task136Theme {
63	        if (authState.isAuthenticated) {
64	            val currentScreen by navigator.currentScreen.collectAsState()
65	            val role = authState.role?.name ?: "Unknown"
66	            val roleEnum = authState.role ?: Role.Viewer
67	            val actor = authState.principal?.userId.orEmpty()
68	            val delegate = authState.principal?.delegateForUserId
69	
70	            val onLogout: () -> Unit = {
71	                clearAllSessionState()
72	                authViewModel.logout()
73	            }
74	
75	            val onNavigate: (Screen) -> Unit = { screen ->
76	                navigator.navigateTo(screen, roleEnum)
77	            }
78	
79	            when (val screen = currentScreen) {
80	                is Screen.Dashboard -> {
81	                    ResourceListScreen(
82	                        viewModel = resourceListViewModel,
83	                        orderWorkflowViewModel = orderWorkflowViewModel,
84	                        meetingWorkflowViewModel = meetingWorkflowViewModel,
85	                        orderFinanceViewModel = orderFinanceViewModel,
86	                        roleLabel = role,
87	                        onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
88	                        onLogout = onLogout,
89	                        actorId = actor,
90	                        delegateForUserId = delegate,
91	                        onNavigate = onNavigate,
92	                    )
93	                }
94	                is Screen.Calendar -> {
95	                    CalendarScreen(
96	                        orderWorkflowViewModel = orderWorkflowViewModel,
97	                        roleLabel = role,
98	                        actorId = actor,
99	                        onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
100	                        onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
101	                    )
102	                }
103	                is Screen.OrderDetail -> {
104	                    if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
105	                        navigator.resetToDashboard()
106	                    } else {
107	                        OrderDetailScreen(
108	                            orderId = screen.orderId,
109	                            orderWorkflowViewModel = orderWorkflowViewModel,
110	                            roleLabel = role,
111	                            actorId = actor,
112	                            onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
113	                            onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
114	                        )
115	                    }
116	                }
117	                is Screen.Cart -> {
118	                    if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
119	                        navigator.resetToDashboard()
120	                    } else {
121	                        CartScreen(
122	                            orderFinanceViewModel = orderFinanceViewModel,
123	                            roleLabel = role,
124	                            actorId = actor,
125	                            delegateForUserId = delegate,
126	                            onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
127	                            onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
128	                        )
129	                    }
130	                }
131	                is Screen.InvoiceDetail -> {
132	                    if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
133	                        navigator.resetToDashboard()
134	                    } else {
135	                        InvoiceDetailScreen(
136	                            invoiceId = screen.invoiceId,
137	                            orderFinanceViewModel = orderFinanceViewModel,
138	                            roleLabel = role,
139	                            actorId = actor,
140	                            onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
141	                            onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
142	                        )
143	                    }
144	                }
145	                is Screen.MeetingDetail -> {
146	                    if (!AppNavigator.isScreenAllowed(screen, roleEnum)) {
147	                        navigator.resetToDashboard()
148	                    } else {
149	                        MeetingDetailScreen(
150	                            meetingId = screen.meetingId,
151	                            meetingWorkflowViewModel = meetingWorkflowViewModel,
152	                            roleLabel = role,
153	                            actorId = actor,
154	                            onBack = { navigator.goBack() },
155	                            onActivity = authViewModel::touchSession,
156	                        )
157	                    }
158	                }
159	            }
160	        } else {
161	            LoginScreen(
162	                state = authState,
163	                onUsernameChange = authViewModel::updateUsername,
164	                onPasswordChange = authViewModel::updatePassword,
165	                onLoginClick = authViewModel::login,
166	            )
167	        }
168	    }
169	}

16	data class ResourceListState(
17	    val isLoading: Boolean = false,
18	    val resources: List<ResourceEntity> = emptyList(),
19	    val error: String? = null,
20	)
21	
22	class ResourceListViewModel(
23	    private val resourceDao: ResourceDao,
24	    private val validationService: ValidationService,
25	    private val isDebug: Boolean = false,
26	    private val ioDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO,
27	) {
28	    private var scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
29	    private val _state = MutableStateFlow(ResourceListState())
30	    val state: StateFlow<ResourceListState> = _state.asStateFlow()
31	
32	    fun loadPage(limit: Int = 5000, offset: Int = 0) {
33	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
34	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(isLoading = true, error = null)
35	            try {
36	                if (isDebug && resourceDao.countAll() == 0) {
37	                    val allergenOptions = listOf("none", "gluten", "dairy", "nuts", "soy", "eggs", "shellfish")
38	                    val seed = (1..5000).map { index ->
39	                        ResourceEntity(
40	                            id = "res-$index",
41	                            name = "Resource $index",
42	                            category = if (index % 2 == 0) "Logistics" else "Operations",
43	                            availableUnits = index % 12,
44	                            unitPrice = (index % 200) + 0.99,
45	                            allergens = allergenOptions[index % allergenOptions.size],
46	                        )
47	                    }
48	                    val validated = seed.filter { validationService.validateAllergenFlags(it.allergens) }
49	                    resourceDao.upsertAll(validated)
50	                }
51	
52	                val rows = resourceDao.page(limit = limit, offset = offset)
53	                _state.value = ResourceListState(isLoading = false, resources = rows)
54	            } catch (e: Exception) {
55	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(isLoading = false, error = "Failed to load resources: ${e.message}")
56	            }
57	        }
58	    }
59	
60	    fun clearSessionState() {
61	        scope.cancel()
62	        scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
63	        _state.value = ResourceListState()
64	    }
65	}

The existing tests use password "Admin1234!" (10 chars, contains digit) which satisfies the policy. The test for "short" password at line 89 now gets rejected by our policy check *before* it reaches the auth service -- but the test already expects `assertFalse(vm.state.value.isAuthenticated)` and `assertNotNull(vm.state.value.error)`, so it will still pass. The test for "wrong11111" also has 10+ chars and a digit, so it passes the policy check.

Everything compiles and all tests pass. Here's a summary of all fixes:

### Issue 1 (High): Password Policy Not Enforced at Login
Added `securityRepository.validatePassword()` check at the start of `AuthViewModel.login()` before launching the coroutine. Passwords that fail the 10-char + 1-digit policy are now rejected synchronously with the first error message.

### Issue 2 (Medium): Cart Not Cleared After Invoice Generation
In `OrderFinanceViewModel.generateInvoice()`, the cart is now cleared both in-memory (`cart = emptyList()`) and in the database (`cartDao.clearForUser(ownerId)`) after successful invoice generation. Receipt line items are captured *before* clearing.

### Issue 3 (Medium): Silent Exception Swallowing
- Replaced both silent `catch (_: Exception)` blocks in `OrderFinanceViewModel` with `AppLogger.w()` logging.
- Replaced `println` in `ReceiptService.android.kt` with `AppLogger.w()`.

### Issue 4 (Medium): Order-Level Split/Merge Not Wired to UI
- Added `splitOrder()` and `mergeOrders()` methods to `OrderWorkflowViewModel` that delegate to `OrderStateMachine.splitOrder/mergeOrders`.
- Added a "Split" button to `OrderDetailScreen`.

### Issue 5 (Medium): Hardcoded Demo Resource in Calendar
- `CalendarScreen` now accepts `ResourceListViewModel`, displays a resource selector (up to 20 resources), and passes the selected resource ID to `createPendingTender()`.
- `CalendarFragment` now uses the first resource from `ResourceListViewModel` instead of hardcoded `"res-1"`.
- Updated `App.kt` to pass `resourceListViewModel` to `CalendarScreen`.

### Issue 6 (Medium): No Admin Resource Management UI
- Added `Screen.Admin` to navigation (Admin-only access).
- Created `AdminScreen.kt` with resource CRUD: add new resources (name, category, units, price) and delete existing ones.
- Added `addResource()` and `deleteResource()` to `ResourceListViewModel`.
- Added `deleteById()` to `ResourceDao`.
- Added "Admin" nav button on dashboard visible only to Admin role.

## 5. Issues / Suggestions (Severity-Rated)

### Blocker

#### B1: Companion Role Cannot Book Meetings (RBAC Misconfiguration)
**Severity:** Blocker  
**Evidence:** `PermissionEvaluator.kt:58` — `PermissionRule(Role.Companion, ResourceType.Meeting, "*", setOf(Action.Read))`  
**Impact:** The prompt explicitly states "Companions can act on behalf of a user for booking and ordering when delegated." Companion has Meeting Read-only, blocking all meeting booking delegation. This is a core business requirement violation.  
**Fix:** Change line 58 to: `PermissionRule(Role.Companion, ResourceType.Meeting, "*", setOf(Action.Read, Action.Write))`

### High

#### H1: No Internal Wallet Balance Management
**Severity:** High  
**Evidence:** `Entities.kt:20` (`encryptedWalletRef: String`), `LocalAuthService.kt:41` (always `""`), `OrderStateMachine.kt:44-48` (`PaymentMethod.InternalWallet` enum only)  
**Impact:** The prompt requires "internal wallet balance" as a payment method. The enum exists but no wallet entity, balance tracking, debit/credit operations, or balance checks exist. Users selecting InternalWallet payment would have no balance validation.  
**Fix:** Add `WalletEntity` with balance field, `WalletDao` with debit/credit queries, and integrate balance checks into `OrderStateMachine.transitionToPendingTender()`.

#### H2: DAO Methods Lack User-Level Authorization for Sensitive Operations
**Severity:** High  
**Evidence:** `OrderDao.kt:18-19` (`getById` no user filter), `OrderDao.kt:33-34` (`deleteById` no user filter), `MeetingDao.kt:18-19` (`getById` no user filter), `MeetingDao.kt:45-46` (`removeAttendee` no user filter), `CartDao.kt:24-25` (`getById` no user filter)  
**Impact:** While user-filtered alternatives exist (`getByIdForActor`, `getByIdForOwnerOrDelegate`), the `OrderStateMachine` and `MeetingWorkflowViewModel.persistStatus()` use the unfiltered `getById()` throughout. Any code path reaching these DAOs bypasses object-level authorization. The state machine operates on `orderId` alone without verifying the caller owns the order.  
**Fix:** Ensure all ViewModel/UseCase code paths use user-filtered DAO methods, or add userId parameters to state machine methods and enforce ownership in the transaction.

#### H3: No Foreign Key Constraints in Room Entities
**Severity:** High  
**Evidence:** `Entities.kt` — no `@ForeignKey` declarations on any entity  
**Impact:** Orphaned records possible: deleting an order doesn't cascade-delete its line items (`OrderLineItemEntity`), deleting a meeting doesn't cascade-delete attendees (`MeetingAttendeeEntity`), deleting a user doesn't cascade device bindings, cart items, or orders. The `splitOrder()` method at `OrderStateMachine.kt:296` explicitly deletes the parent order but line items are manually re-assigned (lines 298-302), which is fragile.  
**Fix:** Add `@ForeignKey` with `onDelete = CASCADE` for OrderLineItem→Order, MeetingAttendee→Meeting, CartItem→User, DeviceBinding→User.

#### H4: `markInTransit` Does Not Update Order State (Only Delivery State)
**Severity:** High  
**Evidence:** `OrderStateMachine.kt:243-244` — only updates `deliveryState` to InTransit, does not change `order.state`  
**Impact:** The order remains in `AwaitingDelivery` state while deliveryState is `InTransit`. The `confirmDelivery()` method at line 255 checks `order.state != AwaitingDelivery`, so it still works, but any query filtering by `order.state` will not reflect in-transit status. State indexes (`state + createdAt`) won't capture this transition.  
**Fix:** Update the order state as well, or document that InTransit is tracked only via `deliveryState` field.

### Medium

#### M1: Demo Password "Viewer1234" Lacks Special Character
**Severity:** Medium  
**Evidence:** `LocalAuthService.kt:25` — `"Viewer1234"` (10 chars, has digit, no special character)  
**Impact:** Inconsistent with other demo passwords that include `!`. While the password policy only requires 10 chars + 1 digit (which this satisfies), it suggests the policy may be too weak for the stated security requirements.  
**Fix:** Either strengthen password policy to require special characters, or update demo password to include one.

#### M2: Tax Calculation Logic Is Inverted
**Severity:** Medium  
**Evidence:** `OrderFinanceViewModel.kt:192` — `val tax = if (abac.canReadInvoiceTaxField(role, context)) subtotal * 0.12 else 0.0`  
**Impact:** Tax is only calculated when the user can "read" the tax field (Admin only). This means non-Admin invoices have $0 tax, which is a business logic error. Tax should always be calculated; the ABAC check should control whether the tax field is *displayed* in the UI, not whether tax is *applied*.  
**Fix:** Always calculate tax; use ABAC to control UI visibility of the tax breakdown, not the calculation itself.

#### M3: No `@Transaction` Annotation on Multi-Entity DAO Operations
**Severity:** Medium  
**Evidence:** `CartDao.kt` — `upsertAll()` at line 39-40 has no `@Transaction`; `OrderStateMachine.kt` uses `database.withTransaction` (line 62) which is correct, but the DAO-level batch operations are unprotected  
**Impact:** Batch cart operations via `upsertAll()` are not atomic at the DAO level. Partial writes possible on interruption.  
**Fix:** Add `@Transaction` annotation to `upsertAll()` in `CartDao.kt` and `OrderLineItemDao.kt`.

#### M4: `expireStaleOrders()` Not Called on App Startup
**Severity:** Medium  
**Evidence:** `OrderStateMachine.kt:336-354` — `expireStaleOrders()` exists but is never called from `MainActivity.kt` or any initialization code  
**Impact:** If the app is killed while orders are in PendingTender state, they will never be cleaned up on restart. The 30-minute coroutine timer (line 104-119) is lost when the process dies. Stale orders will persist indefinitely.  
**Fix:** Call `expireStaleOrders()` from `MainActivity.onCreate()` after database initialization.

#### M5: Companion Role Has Read-Only Access to Learning Module
**Severity:** Medium  
**Evidence:** `PermissionEvaluator.kt:63` — `PermissionRule(Role.Companion, ResourceType.Learning, "*", setOf(Action.Read))`  
**Impact:** The prompt states Companions can "act on behalf of a user" but the Learning module requires Write to enroll (`LearningViewModel.kt:61`). Companions cannot enroll on behalf of their delegating user.  
**Fix:** Add `Action.Write` to Companion's Learning permissions.

#### M6: Session Expiry Check Race Condition
**Severity:** Medium  
**Evidence:** `AuthViewModel.kt:106-119` — `ensureSessionActive()` reads `_state.value` directly without synchronization; `MainActivity.kt:75` calls this every 30 seconds  
**Impact:** `_state.value` is a `MutableStateFlow` which is thread-safe for reads, but the logout decision at lines 112-118 could race with `touchSession()` at line 121-125. A touch could update the expiry just after the check but before the logout.  
**Fix:** Use `_state.update {}` atomic operation or check-and-act within a single state update.

#### M7: Desktop Database Encryption Not Implemented
**Severity:** Medium  
**Evidence:** `EncryptedRoomConfig.desktop.kt` — prints security warning, returns builder unchanged (passphrase ignored)  
**Impact:** Desktop builds store all data unencrypted. The prompt requires "sensitive fields encrypted at rest."  
**Fix:** Integrate SQLCipher JVM for desktop builds. Since the prompt targets Android, this is medium severity (desktop is not the primary target).

#### M8: Merge Operation Loses Second Order's Price Differential
**Severity:** Medium  
**Evidence:** `OrderFinanceViewModel.kt:164` — `unitPrice = cart[0].unitPrice` (ignores cart[1].unitPrice)  
**Impact:** When merging two cart items with different unit prices, the second item's price is lost. The merged item uses only the first item's unit price.  
**Fix:** Calculate weighted average price or sum the total prices independently.

### Low

#### L1: Notification Reuses `scheduleInvoiceReady` for Meeting Events
**Severity:** Low  
**Evidence:** `MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt:120,217-220` — calls `notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady()` for meeting submission/approval events  
**Impact:** Notification title/body reads "Invoice ready" with a dollar total for meeting events, which is semantically incorrect.  
**Fix:** Add a `scheduleMeetingReminder()` method to `NotificationGateway`.

#### L2: Order ID and Meeting ID Use Epoch Milliseconds (Collision Risk)
**Severity:** Low  
**Evidence:** `OrderWorkflowViewModel.kt:78-79` — `"ord-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"`, `MeetingWorkflowViewModel.kt:79`  
**Impact:** Two rapid successive calls could generate identical IDs. Low probability but non-zero.  
**Fix:** Append a random suffix or use UUID.

#### L3: No Empty-State UI for Lists
**Severity:** Low

16	class PermissionEvaluator(
17	    private val rules: List<PermissionRule>,
18	) {
19	    fun canAccess(role: Role, resource: ResourceType, field: String, action: Action): Boolean {
20	        return rules.any { rule ->
21	            rule.role == role &&
22	                rule.resource == resource &&
23	                (rule.field == field || rule.field == "*") &&
24	                action in rule.allowedActions
25	        }
26	    }
27	
28	    suspend fun <T> guardOrNull(
29	        role: Role,
30	        resource: ResourceType,
31	        field: String,
32	        action: Action,
33	        valueProvider: suspend () -> T,
34	    ): T? = if (canAccess(role, resource, field, action)) valueProvider() else null
35	}

50	const val MIN_PRICE = 0.01
51	const val MAX_PRICE = 9_999.99
52	
53	private const val TAG = "OrderStateMachine"
54	
55	open class OrderStateMachine(
56	    private val database: AppDatabase,
57	    private val clock: Clock,
58	) {
59	    private val scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
60	
61	    protected open suspend fun <R> runInTransaction(block: suspend () -> R): R {
62	        return database.withTransaction { block() }
63	    }
64	
65	    fun observeState(orderId: String): Flow<OrderState> {
66	        return database.orderDao().observeById(orderId)
67	            .filterNotNull()
68	            .map { OrderState.valueOf(it.state) }
69	    }
70	
71	    fun validatePrice(price: Double): String? {
72	        if (price < MIN_PRICE) return "Price must be at least $$MIN_PRICE"
73	        if (price > MAX_PRICE) return "Price must not exceed $$MAX_PRICE"
74	        return null
75	    }
76	
77	    suspend fun transitionToPendingTender(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): String? {
78	        if (role == Role.Viewer) return "Denied: Viewer cannot create orders"
79	        val now = clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()
80	        val expiresAt = clock.now().plus(30.minutes).toEpochMilliseconds()
81	
82	        var error: String? = null
83	        runInTransaction {
84	            val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction
85	            val priceError = validatePrice(order.totalPrice)
86	            if (priceError != null) {
87	                error = priceError
88	                return@runInTransaction
89	            }
90	            val pending = order.copy(state = OrderState.PendingTender.name, expiresAt = expiresAt)
91	            database.orderDao().update(pending)
92	            AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId transitioned to PendingTender")
93	
94	            val resource = database.resourceDao().getById(order.resourceId)
95	            if (resource != null) {
96	                val newUnits = (resource.availableUnits - order.quantity).coerceAtLeast(0)
97	                database.resourceDao().update(resource.copy(availableUnits = newUnits))
98	                AppLogger.i(TAG, "Reserved ${order.quantity} units for $orderId, remaining: $newUnits")
99	            }
100	        }
101	
102	        if (error != null) return error
103	
104	        scope.launch {
105	            delay(30.minutes)
106	            runInTransaction {
107	                val latest = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction
108	                if (latest.state == OrderState.PendingTender.name && (latest.expiresAt ?: now) <= clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()) {
109	                    database.orderDao().update(
110	                        latest.copy(
111	                            state = OrderState.Cancelled.name,
112	                            notes = "Auto-cancelled: pending tender timeout",
113	                        ),
114	                    )
115	                    restockInventory(latest)
116	                    AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId auto-expired after 30 minutes")
117	                }
118	            }
119	        }
120	        return null
121	    }
122	
123	    suspend fun confirm(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
124	        if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
125	        return runInTransaction {
126	            val latest = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
127	            if (latest.state != OrderState.PendingTender.name) return@runInTransaction false
128	            database.orderDao().update(latest.copy(state = OrderState.Confirmed.name, expiresAt = null))
129	            AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId confirmed")
130	            true
131	        }
132	    }
133	
134	    suspend fun cancel(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
135	        if (role == Role.Viewer) return false
136	        return runInTransaction {
137	            val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
138	            if (order.state == OrderState.Cancelled.name ||
139	                order.state == OrderState.Refunded.name
140	            ) return@runInTransaction false
141	            database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.Cancelled.name))
142	            if (order.state == OrderState.PendingTender.name || order.state == OrderState.Confirmed.name) {
143	                restockInventory(order)
144	            }
145	            AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId cancelled, inventory restocked")
146	            true
147	        }
148	    }
149	
150	    suspend fun requestReturn(orderId: String, role: Role? = null): Boolean {
151	        if (role == Role.Viewer || role == Role.Companion) return false
152	        return runInTransaction {
153	            val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction false
154	            if (order.state != OrderState.Confirmed.name && order.state != OrderState.Delivered.name) return@runInTransaction false
155	            database.orderDao().update(order.copy(state = OrderState.ReturnRequested.name))

163	        return runInTransaction {

268	    suspend fun splitOrder(orderId: String, splitQuantity: Int): Pair<String, String>? {
269	        return runInTransaction {
270	            val order = database.orderDao().getById(orderId) ?: return@runInTransaction null
271	            if (order.quantity < 2 || splitQuantity < 1 || splitQuantity >= order.quantity) return@runInTransaction null
272	
273	            val leftQty = splitQuantity
274	            val rightQty = order.quantity - splitQuantity
275	            val leftPrice = kotlin.math.round(order.totalPrice * leftQty / order.quantity * 100) / 100.0
276	            val rightPrice = kotlin.math.round((order.totalPrice - leftPrice) * 100) / 100.0
277	
278	            val leftId = "${orderId}-a"
279	            val rightId = "${orderId}-b"
280	
281	            val leftOrder = order.copy(
282	                id = leftId,
283	                quantity = leftQty,
284	                totalPrice = leftPrice,
285	                state = OrderState.PartiallyFulfilled.name,
286	            )
287	            val rightOrder = order.copy(
288	                id = rightId,
289	                quantity = rightQty,
290	                totalPrice = rightPrice,
291	                state = OrderState.PartiallyFulfilled.name,
292	            )
293	
294	            database.orderDao().upsert(leftOrder)
295	            database.orderDao().upsert(rightOrder)
296	            database.orderDao().deleteById(orderId)
297	
298	            val lineItems = database.orderLineItemDao().getByOrderId(orderId)
299	            lineItems.forEach { item ->
300	                database.orderLineItemDao().upsert(item.copy(id = "${item.id}-a", orderId = leftId))
301	                database.orderLineItemDao().upsert(item.copy(id = "${item.id}-b", orderId = rightId))
302	            }
303	
304	            AppLogger.i(TAG, "Order $orderId split into $leftId and $rightId")
305	            Pair(leftId, rightId)
306	        }
307	    }

309	    suspend fun mergeOrders(orderId1: String, orderId2: String): String? {
310	        return runInTransaction {
311	            val order1 = database.orderDao().getById(orderId1) ?: return@runInTransaction null
312	            val order2 = database.orderDao().getById(orderId2) ?: return@runInTransaction null
313	            if (order1.userId != order2.userId) return@runInTransaction null
314	
315	            val mergedId = "${orderId1}+${orderId2}"
316	            val merged = order1.copy(
317	                id = mergedId,
318	                quantity = order1.quantity + order2.quantity,
319	                totalPrice = order1.totalPrice + order2.totalPrice,
320	            )
321	            database.orderDao().upsert(merged)
322	            database.orderDao().deleteById(orderId1)
323	            database.orderDao().deleteById(orderId2)
324	
325	            val items1 = database.orderLineItemDao().getByOrderId(orderId1)
326	            val items2 = database.orderLineItemDao().getByOrderId(orderId2)
327	            (items1 + items2).forEach { item ->
328	                database.orderLineItemDao().upsert(item.copy(orderId = mergedId))
329	            }
330	
331	            AppLogger.i(TAG, "Orders $orderId1 and $orderId2 merged into $mergedId")
332	            mergedId
333	        }
334	    }
335	
336	    suspend fun expireStaleOrders() {
337	        val now = clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()
338	        val stale = database.orderDao().getExpiredPendingOrders(now)
339	        stale.forEach { order ->
340	            runInTransaction {
341	                val latest = database.orderDao().getById(order.id) ?: return@runInTransaction
342	                if (latest.state == OrderState.PendingTender.name) {
343	                    database.orderDao().update(
344	                        latest.copy(
345	                            state = OrderState.Cancelled.name,
346	                            notes = "Auto-cancelled: pending tender timeout",
347	                        ),
348	                    )
349	                    restockInventory(latest)
350	                    AppLogger.i(TAG, "Stale order ${order.id} expired on startup, inventory restocked")
351	                }
352	            }
353	        }
354	    }
355	
356	    private suspend fun restockInventory(order: OrderEntity) {
357	        val resource = database.resourceDao().getById(order.resourceId) ?: return
358	        database.resourceDao().update(resource.copy(availableUnits = resource.availableUnits + order.quantity))
359	    }
360	}

54	class OrderFinanceViewModel(
55	    private val abac: AbacPolicyEvaluator,
56	    private val permissionEvaluator: PermissionEvaluator,
57	    private val validationService: ValidationService,
58	    private val deviceBindingService: DeviceBindingService,
59	    private val cartDao: CartDao,

63	    private val deviceFingerprint: String = getDeviceFingerprint(),
64	) {
65	    private var scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
66	    private val _state = MutableStateFlow(OrderFinanceState())
67	    val state: StateFlow<OrderFinanceState> = _state.asStateFlow()
68	
69	    private suspend fun resolveDeviceTrust(userId: String): Boolean {
70	        return deviceBindingService.isDeviceTrusted(userId, deviceFingerprint)
71	    }

73	    fun addCartItem(
74	        role: Role,
75	        actorId: String,
76	        delegateForUserId: String? = null,
77	        resourceId: String,
78	        label: String,
79	        quantity: Int,
80	        unitPrice: Double,
81	    ) {
82	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
83	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Add item denied for role")
84	            return
85	        }
86	        val priceError = validationService.validatePrice(unitPrice)
87	        if (priceError != null) {
88	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = priceError)
89	            return
90	        }
91	        if (quantity <= 0) {
92	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Quantity must be at least 1")
93	            return
94	        }
95	        val ownerId = delegateForUserId ?: actorId
96	        val itemId = "item-${_state.value.cart.size + 1}"
97	        val next = CartItem(
98	            id = itemId,
99	            label = label,
100	            quantity = quantity,
101	            unitPrice = unitPrice,
102	        )
103	        _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = _state.value.cart + next, note = null)
104	
105	        scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
106	            cartDao.upsert(
107	                CartItemEntity(
108	                    id = itemId,
109	                    userId = ownerId,
110	                    actorId = actorId,
111	                    resourceId = resourceId,
112	                    label = next.label,
113	                    quantity = next.quantity,
114	                    unitPrice = next.unitPrice,
115	                ),
116	            )
117	        }
118	    }

121	        addCartItem(
122	            role = role,
123	            actorId = actorId,
124	            delegateForUserId = delegateForUserId,
125	            resourceId = "res-1",
126	            label = "Service Package ${_state.value.cart.size + 1}",
127	            quantity = 1,
128	            unitPrice = 49.99,
129	        )
130	    }
131	
132	    fun splitFirstItem(role: Role, actorId: String, delegateForUserId: String? = null) {
133	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
134	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Split denied for role")
135	            return
136	        }
137	        val first = _state.value.cart.firstOrNull() ?: return
138	        if (first.quantity < 2) {
139	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Split requires quantity >= 2")
140	            return
141	        }
142	        val ownerId = delegateForUserId ?: actorId
143	        val left = first.copy(id = "${first.id}-a", quantity = first.quantity / 2)
144	        val right = first.copy(id = "${first.id}-b", quantity = first.quantity - left.quantity)
145	        _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = listOf(left, right) + _state.value.cart.drop(1), note = "Order split")
146	        scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
147	            cartDao.deleteByIdForUser(first.id, ownerId)
148	            cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = left.id, userId = ownerId, actorId = actorId, resourceId = "res-1", label = left.label, quantity = left.quantity, unitPrice = left.unitPrice))
149	            cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = right.id, userId = ownerId, actorId = actorId, resourceId = "res-1", label = right.label, quantity = right.quantity, unitPrice = right.unitPrice))
150	        }
151	    }
152	
153	    fun mergeFirstTwoItems(role: Role, actorId: String, delegateForUserId: String? = null) {
154	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
155	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Merge denied for role")
156	            return
157	        }
158	        val ownerId = delegateForUserId ?: actorId
159	        val cart = _state.value.cart
160	        if (cart.size < 2) return
161	        val merged = cart[0].copy(
162	            id = "${cart[0].id}+${cart[1].id}",
163	            quantity = cart[0].quantity + cart[1].quantity,
164	            unitPrice = cart[0].unitPrice,
165	        )
166	        _state.value = _state.value.copy(cart = listOf(merged) + cart.drop(2), note = "Orders merged")
167	        scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
168	            cartDao.deleteByIdForUser(cart[0].id, ownerId)
169	            cartDao.deleteByIdForUser(cart[1].id, ownerId)
170	            cartDao.upsert(CartItemEntity(id = merged.id, userId = ownerId, actorId = actorId, resourceId = "res-1", label = merged.label, quantity = merged.quantity, unitPrice = merged.unitPrice))
171	        }
172	    }
173	
174	    fun generateInvoice(role: Role, actorId: String, delegateForUserId: String? = null) {
175	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Order, "*", Action.Write)) {
176	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Invoice denied for role")
177	            return
178	        }
179	        if (_state.value.cart.isEmpty()) return
180	        val subtotal = _state.value.cart.sumOf { it.unitPrice * it.quantity }
181	        val priceError = validationService.validatePrice(subtotal)
182	        if (priceError != null) {
183	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = priceError)
184	            return
185	        }
186	
187	        val ownerId = delegateForUserId ?: actorId
188	        scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
189	            val trusted = resolveDeviceTrust(actorId)
190	            val isDelegate = delegateForUserId != null
191	            val context = AccessContext(requesterId = actorId, ownerId = ownerId, isDelegate = isDelegate, deviceTrusted = trusted)
192	            val tax = if (abac.canReadInvoiceTaxField(role, context)) subtotal * 0.12 else 0.0
193	            val invoice = InvoiceDraft(
194	                id = "inv-${_state.value.invoices.size + 1}",
195	                subtotal = subtotal,
196	                tax = tax,
197	                total = subtotal + tax,
198	                orderId = _state.value.cart.firstOrNull()?.id,
199	                ownerId = ownerId,
200	                actorId = actorId,
201	            )
202	            val receiptItems = _state.value.cart.map {
203	                ReceiptLineItem(label = it.label, amount = it.quantity * it.unitPrice)
204	            }
205	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(
206	                cart = emptyList(),
207	                invoices = _state.value.invoices + invoice,
208	                note = "Invoice generated",
209	            )
210	            cartDao.clearForUser(ownerId)
211	
212	            try {
213	                notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady(invoice.id, invoice.total)
214	            } catch (e: Exception) {
215	                AppLogger.w(TAG, "Notification scheduling failed: ${e.message}")
216	            }
217	
218	            try {
219	                receiptGateway.shareReceipt(invoice.id, ownerId, receiptItems, invoice.total)
220	            } catch (e: Exception) {
221	                AppLogger.w(TAG, "Receipt generation failed: ${e.message}")
222	            }
223	        }
224	    }
225	
226	    fun refundLatest(role: Role, actorId: String) {
227	        val latest = _state.value.invoices.lastOrNull() ?: return
228	        scope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
229	            val trusted = resolveDeviceTrust(actorId)
230	            val context = AccessContext(requesterId = actorId, ownerId = actorId, isDelegate = false, deviceTrusted = trusted)
231	            if (!abac.canIssueRefund(role, context)) {
232	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Refund denied for role")
233	                return@launch
234	            }
235	            val orderId = latest.orderId
236	            if (orderId == null || stateMachine == null) {
237	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Refund requires a linked order")
238	                return@launch
239	            }
240	            val requested = stateMachine.requestRefund(orderId, role)
241	            val completed = if (requested) stateMachine.completeRefund(orderId, role) else false
242	            if (!requested || !completed) {
243	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Refund state transition failed")
244	                return@launch
245	            }
246	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(refunds = _state.value.refunds + "Refunded ${latest.id}", note = "Refund completed")
247	        }
248	    }
249	
250	    fun clearSessionState() {
251	        scope.cancel()
252	        scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
253	        _state.value = OrderFinanceState()
254	    }
255	}

3	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.UserDao
4	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.db.UserEntity
5	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
6	
7	data class AuthPrincipal(
8	    val userId: String,
9	    val displayName: String,
10	    val role: Role,
11	    val delegateForUserId: String? = null,
12	)
13	
14	class LocalAuthService(
15	    private val userDao: UserDao,
16	    private val enableDemoSeed: Boolean = false,
17	) {
18	    suspend fun seedDemoAccountsIfNeeded() {
19	        if (!enableDemoSeed) return
20	        if (userDao.countAll() > 0) return
21	        val demos = listOf(
22	            DemoRecord("admin", "Admin1234!", "Avery Admin", Role.Admin),
23	            DemoRecord("supervisor", "Super1234!", "Sky Supervisor", Role.Supervisor),
24	            DemoRecord("operator", "Oper12345!", "Olive Operator", Role.Operator),
25	            DemoRecord("viewer", "Viewer1234", "Vera Viewer", Role.Viewer),
26	            DemoRecord("companion", "Companion1!", "Casey Companion", Role.Companion, delegateFor = "operator"),
27	        )
28	        demos.forEach { demo ->
29	            val salt = secureRandomHex(16)
30	            val hash = pbkdf2Hash(password = demo.password, salt = salt)
31	            userDao.upsert(
32	                UserEntity(
33	                    id = demo.username,
34	                    fullName = demo.displayName,
35	                    email = "${demo.username}@eaglepoint.local",
36	                    role = demo.role.name,
37	                    passwordHash = hash,
38	                    passwordSalt = salt,
39	                    delegateForUserId = demo.delegateFor,
40	                    maskedPII = "",
41	                    encryptedWalletRef = "",
42	                    isActive = true,
43	                ),
44	            )
45	        }
46	    }
47	
48	    suspend fun authenticate(username: String, password: String): AuthPrincipal? {
49	        val user = userDao.getById(username) ?: return null
50	        if (!user.isActive) return null
51	        val candidateHash = pbkdf2Hash(password = password, salt = user.passwordSalt)
52	        if (!constantTimeEquals(user.passwordHash, candidateHash)) return null
53	        val role = try { Role.valueOf(user.role) } catch (_: Exception) { return null }
54	        return AuthPrincipal(
55	            userId = user.id,
56	            displayName = user.fullName,
57	            role = role,
58	            delegateForUserId = user.delegateForUserId,
59	        )
60	    }
61	
62	    private data class DemoRecord(
63	        val username: String,
64	        val password: String,
65	        val displayName: String,
66	        val role: Role,
67	        val delegateFor: String? = null,
68	    )
69	}

1	package com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.viewmodel
2	
3	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.rbac.Role
4	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.AuthPrincipal
5	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.DeviceBindingResult
6	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.DeviceBindingService
7	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.LocalAuthService
8	import com.eaglepoint.task136.shared.security.SecurityRepository
9	import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
10	import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
11	import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
12	import kotlinx.coroutines.SupervisorJob
13	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
14	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
15	import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
16	import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
17	import kotlinx.datetime.Clock
18	import kotlinx.datetime.Instant
19	import kotlin.time.Duration
20	import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.hours
21	import kotlin.time.Duration.Companion.minutes
22	
23	data class AuthUiState(
24	    val username: String = "",
25	    val password: String = "",
26	    val principal: AuthPrincipal? = null,
27	    val error: String? = null,
28	    val sessionExpiresAt: Instant? = null,
29	    val absoluteSessionExpiresAt: Instant? = null,
30	) {
31	    val isAuthenticated: Boolean get() = principal != null
32	    val role: Role? get() = principal?.role
33	}
34	
35	class AuthViewModel(
36	    private val securityRepository: SecurityRepository,
37	    private val authService: LocalAuthService,
38	    private val deviceBindingService: DeviceBindingService? = null,
39	    private val deviceFingerprint: String = "",
40	    private val clock: Clock,
41	    private val sessionDuration: Duration = 30.minutes,
42	    private val absoluteSessionLimit: Duration = 8.hours,
43	    private val ioDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO,
44	) {
45	    private val scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
46	    private val _state = MutableStateFlow(AuthUiState())
47	    val state: StateFlow<AuthUiState> = _state.asStateFlow()
48	
49	    fun updateUsername(value: String) {
50	        _state.value = _state.value.copy(username = value, error = null)
51	    }
52	
53	    fun updatePassword(value: String) {
54	        _state.value = _state.value.copy(password = value, error = null)
55	    }
56	
57	    fun login() {
58	        val snapshot = _state.value
59	        val userId = snapshot.username.trim().lowercase()
60	        if (userId.isBlank()) {
61	            _state.value = snapshot.copy(error = "Username is required")
62	            return
63	        }
64	
65	        val policyResult = securityRepository.validatePassword(snapshot.password)
66	        if (!policyResult.isValid) {
67	            _state.value = snapshot.copy(error = policyResult.errors.first())
68	            return
69	        }
70	
71	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
72	            if (!securityRepository.canAuthenticate(userId, clock.now())) {
73	                _state.value = snapshot.copy(error = "Too many attempts. Try again later.")
74	                return@launch
75	            }
76	
77	            val principal = authService.authenticate(userId, snapshot.password)
78	            if (principal == null) {
79	                securityRepository.recordFailure(userId, clock.now())
80	                _state.value = snapshot.copy(error = "Invalid username or password")
81	                return@launch
82	            }
83	
84	            if (deviceBindingService != null && deviceFingerprint.isNotBlank()) {
85	                val bindResult = deviceBindingService.checkAndBindDevice(userId, deviceFingerprint)
86	                if (bindResult is DeviceBindingResult.LimitExceeded) {
87	                    _state.value = snapshot.copy(
88	                        error = "Device limit exceeded (${bindResult.bound}/${bindResult.max}). Ask an Admin to reset your device bindings.",
89	                    )
90	                    return@launch
91	                }
92	            }
93	
94	            securityRepository.recordSuccess(userId)
95	            val now = clock.now()
96	            _state.value = snapshot.copy(
97	                principal = principal,
98	                error = null,
99	                password = "",
100	                sessionExpiresAt = now.plus(sessionDuration),
101	                absoluteSessionExpiresAt = now.plus(absoluteSessionLimit),
102	            )
103	        }
104	    }
105	
106	    fun ensureSessionActive() {
107	        val now = clock.now()
108	        val idleExpiry = _state.value.sessionExpiresAt
109	        val absoluteExpiry = _state.value.absoluteSessionExpiresAt
110	
111	        if (idleExpiry != null && now >= idleExpiry) {
112	            logout("Session expired. Please sign in again.")
113	            return
114	        }
115	        if (absoluteExpiry != null && now >= absoluteExpiry) {
116	            logout("Maximum session duration reached. Please sign in again.")
117	            return
118	        }
119	    }
120	
121	    fun touchSession() {
122	        val snapshot = _state.value
123	        if (!snapshot.isAuthenticated) return
124	        _state.value = snapshot.copy(sessionExpiresAt = clock.now().plus(sessionDuration))
125	    }
126	
127	    fun logout(message: String? = null) {
128	        val previous = _state.value
129	        _state.value = AuthUiState(
130	            username = previous.username,
131	            error = message,
132	        )
133	    }
134	}

32	enum class MeetingStatus {
33	    Draft,
34	    PendingApproval,
35	    Approved,
36	    Denied,
37	    CheckedIn,
38	    NoShow,
39	}
40	
41	data class AttendeeInfo(
42	    val id: String,
43	    val name: String,
44	    val rsvp: String = "Pending",
45	)
46	
47	data class MeetingWorkflowState(
48	    val status: MeetingStatus = MeetingStatus.Draft,
49	    val meetingId: String? = null,
50	    val meetingStart: Instant? = null,
51	    val agenda: String = "",
52	    val attendees: List<AttendeeInfo> = emptyList(),
53	    val note: String? = null,
54	)
55	
56	class MeetingWorkflowViewModel(
57	    private val validationService: ValidationService,
58	    private val permissionEvaluator: PermissionEvaluator,
59	    private val abacPolicyEvaluator: AbacPolicyEvaluator,
60	    private val deviceBindingService: DeviceBindingService,
61	    private val meetingDao: MeetingDao,
62	    private val notificationGateway: NotificationGateway,
63	    private val bookingUseCase: BookingUseCase,
64	    private val clock: Clock,
65	    private val deviceFingerprint: String = getDeviceFingerprint(),
66	    private val ioDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher = Dispatchers.IO,
67	) {
68	    private var scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
69	    private val _state = MutableStateFlow(MeetingWorkflowState())
70	    val state: StateFlow<MeetingWorkflowState> = _state.asStateFlow()
71	
72	    fun submitMeeting(
73	        start: Instant = clock.now().plus(20.minutes),
74	        agenda: String = "",
75	        organizerId: String = "",
76	        actorId: String = organizerId,
77	        resourceId: String = "res-1",
78	    ) {
79	        val meetingId = "mtg-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"
80	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
81	            // Check for time conflicts
82	            val endTime = start.plus(30.minutes)
83	            val candidate = TimeWindow(start, endTime)
84	            val existingMeetings = meetingDao.pageByResource(
85	                resourceId = resourceId,
86	                rangeStart = start.toEpochMilliseconds() - 86_400_000L,
87	                rangeEnd = endTime.toEpochMilliseconds() + 86_400_000L,
88	            )
89	            val existingWindows = existingMeetings
90	                .map { TimeWindow(
91	                    kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.startTime),
92	                    kotlinx.datetime.Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(it.endTime),
93	                ) }
94	
95	            if (bookingUseCase.overlaps(existingWindows, candidate)) {
96	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Conflict: time slot overlaps with existing meeting")
97	                return@launch
98	            }
99	
100	            _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState(
101	                status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval,
102	                meetingId = meetingId,
103	                meetingStart = start,
104	                agenda = agenda,
105	                note = "Awaiting supervisor approval",
106	            )
107	            meetingDao.upsert(
108	                MeetingEntity(
109	                    id = meetingId,
110	                    organizerId = organizerId,
111	                    resourceId = resourceId,
112	                    title = "Meeting",
113	                    startTime = start.toEpochMilliseconds(),
114	                    endTime = endTime.toEpochMilliseconds(),
115	                    status = MeetingStatus.PendingApproval.name,
116	                    agenda = agenda,
117	                    note = if (actorId != organizerId) "createdBy:$actorId" else null,
118	                ),
119	            )
120	            notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady("mtg-submitted-$meetingId", 0.0)
121	        }
122	    }
123	
124	    fun addAttendee(name: String, role: Role, actorId: String, ownerId: String = actorId, isDelegate: Boolean = false) {
125	        val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
126	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
127	            val trusted = deviceBindingService.isDeviceTrusted(actorId, deviceFingerprint)
128	            val context = AccessContext(
129	                requesterId = actorId,
130	                ownerId = ownerId,
131	                isDelegate = isDelegate,
132	                deviceTrusted = trusted,
133	            )
134	            if (!abacPolicyEvaluator.canManageAttendee(role, context)) {
135	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Attendee access denied")
136	                return@launch
137	            }
138	
139	            val existing = meetingDao.getById(meetingId) ?: run {
140	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Meeting not found")
141	                return@launch
142	            }
143	
144	            val attendeeId = "att-${clock.now().toEpochMilliseconds()}"
145	            val info = AttendeeInfo(id = attendeeId, name = name)
146	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(attendees = _state.value.attendees + info, note = null)
147	            meetingDao.upsertAttendee(
148	                MeetingAttendeeEntity(
149	                    id = attendeeId,
150	                    meetingId = existing.id,
151	                    userId = name,
152	                    displayName = name,
153	                ),
154	            )
155	        }
156	    }
157	
158	    fun loadMeetingDetail(meetingId: String, role: Role, actorId: String, ownerId: String = actorId, isDelegate: Boolean = false) {
159	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
160	            val meeting = when (role) {
161	                Role.Admin, Role.Supervisor -> meetingDao.getById(meetingId)
162	                else -> meetingDao.getByIdForOrganizer(meetingId, actorId)
163	            }
164	            if (meeting == null) {
165	                _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Meeting not found or access denied")
166	                return@launch
167	            }
168	
169	            val trusted = deviceBindingService.isDeviceTrusted(actorId, deviceFingerprint)
170	            val context = AccessContext(
171	                requesterId = actorId,
172	                ownerId = ownerId,
173	                isDelegate = isDelegate,
174	                deviceTrusted = trusted,
175	            )
176	            val canSeeAttendees = abacPolicyEvaluator.canReadAttendee(role, context)
177	            val attendees = if (canSeeAttendees) {
178	                meetingDao.getAttendees(meetingId).map {
179	                    AttendeeInfo(id = it.id, name = it.displayName, rsvp = it.rsvpStatus)
180	                }
181	            } else {
182	                emptyList()
183	            }
184	
185	            _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState(
186	                status = MeetingStatus.valueOf(meeting.status),
187	                meetingId = meeting.id,
188	                meetingStart = Instant.fromEpochMilliseconds(meeting.startTime),
189	                agenda = meeting.agenda,
190	                attendees = attendees,
191	                note = if (canSeeAttendees) null else "Attendee list restricted to Supervisor/Admin",
192	            )
193	        }
194	    }
195	
196	    fun updateAgenda(agenda: String) {
197	        _state.value = _state.value.copy(agenda = agenda)
198	        val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
199	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
200	            val existing = meetingDao.getById(meetingId) ?: return@launch
201	            meetingDao.update(existing.copy(agenda = agenda))
202	        }
203	    }
204	
205	    fun approve(role: Role) {
206	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Meeting, "*", Action.Approve)) {
207	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Approval denied for role")
208	            return
209	        }
210	        val current = _state.value
211	        if (current.status != MeetingStatus.PendingApproval) return
212	        _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.Approved, note = "Approved")
213	        persistStatus(MeetingStatus.Approved)
214	        scheduleAutoNoShow()
215	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
216	            val meetingId = current.meetingId ?: return@launch
217	            notificationGateway.scheduleInvoiceReady(
218	                "mtg-approved-$meetingId",
219	                0.0,
220	            )
221	        }
222	    }
223	
224	    fun deny(role: Role) {
225	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Meeting, "*", Action.Approve)) {
226	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Denial denied for role")
227	            return
228	        }
229	        val current = _state.value
230	        if (current.status != MeetingStatus.PendingApproval) return
231	        _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.Denied, note = "Denied by supervisor")
232	        persistStatus(MeetingStatus.Denied)
233	    }
234	
235	    fun checkIn(role: Role) {
236	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Meeting, "*", Action.Write)) {
237	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "Check-in denied for role")
238	            return
239	        }
240	        val current = _state.value
241	        val start = current.meetingStart ?: return
242	        if (current.status != MeetingStatus.Approved) return
243	
244	        val valid = validationService.isWithinSupervisorWindow(start, clock.now())
245	        _state.value = if (valid) {
246	            current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.CheckedIn, note = "Checked in within +/-10 minutes")
247	        } else {
248	            current.copy(note = "Outside check-in window")
249	        }
250	        if (valid) persistStatus(MeetingStatus.CheckedIn)
251	    }
252	
253	    fun markNoShowIfDue(role: Role, now: Instant = clock.now()) {
254	        if (!permissionEvaluator.canAccess(role, ResourceType.Meeting, "*", Action.Approve)) {
255	            _state.value = _state.value.copy(note = "No-show action denied for role")
256	            return
257	        }
258	        val current = _state.value
259	        val start = current.meetingStart ?: return
260	        if (current.status == MeetingStatus.Approved && now > start.plus(10.minutes)) {
261	            _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.NoShow, note = "Marked no-show")
262	            persistStatus(MeetingStatus.NoShow)
263	        }
264	    }
265	
266	    private fun scheduleAutoNoShow() {
267	        val start = _state.value.meetingStart ?: return
268	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
269	            val waitUntil = start.plus(10.minutes)
270	            val waitDuration = waitUntil - clock.now()
271	            if (waitDuration.isPositive()) {
272	                delay(waitDuration)
273	            }
274	            val current = _state.value
275	            if (current.status == MeetingStatus.Approved) {
276	                _state.value = current.copy(status = MeetingStatus.NoShow, note = "Auto-marked no-show (10 min past start)")
277	                persistStatus(MeetingStatus.NoShow)
278	            }
279	        }
280	    }
281	
282	    private fun persistStatus(status: MeetingStatus) {
283	        val meetingId = _state.value.meetingId ?: return
284	        scope.launch(ioDispatcher) {
285	            val existing = meetingDao.getById(meetingId) ?: return@launch
286	            meetingDao.update(existing.copy(status = status.name))
287	        }
288	    }
289	
290	    fun clearSessionState() {
291	        scope.cancel()
292	        scope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Default)
293	        _state.value = MeetingWorkflowState()
294	    }
295	}
